stemHtml: You are the pilot flying a light aeroplane with a clockwise turning propeller. While you are distracted by having to deal with a minor equipment failure, the stall warning horn activates. Which of the following would indicate that the aircraft had entered a full stall, if you do NOT respond to the warning and try to maintain level flight using the elevator?

options.a: The nose pitching down with a full pitch-up elevator.
options.b: The aileron controls give a feeling of a heavy buffet.
options.c: The effect of the rudder control being reversed.
options.d: The nose yaws to the right regardless of the rudder input.
